steps.title: Find the student percentage
steps.content: The listed groups other than students make up $10\%+50\%+25\%=85\%$ of the committee. Therefore, students make up the remaining $15\%$.

steps.title: Find the committee size
steps.content:
The $9$ students represent $15\%$ of the committee.
$$0.15T=9$$
$$T=60$$

steps.title: Compare the two groups
steps.content:
Teachers are $50\%$ of $60$, and administrators are $25\%$ of $60$.
$$0.50(60)-0.25(60)=30-15=15$$
The answer is 15.
